title: The Fastest Way to Set Up How Kenyan Creators Get Paid Internationally and Start Selling
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: Kenyan creators, you’re blocked. PayPal limits you. Stripe isn’t an option. Selling globally feels impossible. But today, you can bypass these restrictions. Blockchain payments remove borders. No KYC. No bank account needed. This is your urgent action plan to start selling internationally—today. Skip the fluff. Focus on speed. By tonight, you’ll have a live store accepting 300+ cryptocurrencies from anyone, anywhere.
What You Can Actually Get Done Today

Today, you’ll set up a digital product store that accepts global payments without PayPal or Stripe. Start by grabbing the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99). It includes everything: Core Shop Engine for automated delivery, Web3 Wallet Connect for crypto payments, and Admin Dashboard for order management. Deploy it on your domain or GitHub Pages. Connect NOWPayments for instant crypto processing—no KYC, no buyer account required. Upload your first product—ebook, course, or template. Test the checkout with a small transaction. By tonight, your store will be live, accepting BTC, ETH, USDT, and 300+ coins from buyers worldwide.
The Minimum Viable Setup That Works

You don’t need a custom website or complex integrations. Use the Core Shop Engine to handle backend automation—payment verification, file delivery, and PDF receipts. Add Web3 Wallet Connect for a frontend that displays multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds. The Admin Dashboard gives you real-time transaction logs and order management. This setup is lightweight, fast, and global. Focus on selling, not building. Your buyers in Europe, Asia, or the Americas will pay seamlessly, and you’ll get paid directly to your wallet—no middlemen, no delays.
Skipping the Steps That Do Not Matter Yet

Ignore custom branding, email marketing, or SEO for now. These are distractions. Your priority is getting paid. Use the default templates in the Full Stack Bundle—they’re clean and functional. Skip setting up a merchant account or integrating third-party tools. NOWPayments handles crypto payments without requiring your buyers to create accounts. Don’t waste time on social media promotion. Focus on your existing network—email your subscribers, DM your followers, or post in relevant communities. Speed is the goal. Get your first sale before optimizing.
Blockchain payments remove geographic barriers—sell to anyone, anywhere, instantly.
Getting Your First Transaction Live

Test your store before going live. Send a small crypto payment to your own wallet using NOWPayments. Ensure the Core Shop Engine delivers the product instantly. Check the Admin Dashboard for transaction logs. Once confirmed, share your store link with one trusted buyer. Ask them to purchase and report back on the experience. Fix any issues immediately. Then, launch publicly. Post in Kenyan creator groups, forums, or platforms like Twitter and Facebook. Your first sale proves the system works. From there, scale.
What to Do in the Next 24 Hours

In the next 24 hours, deploy the Full Stack Bundle, connect NOWPayments, and upload your product. Test the checkout process yourself. Share your store with three people who’ve asked how you sell globally. Track your first sale in the Admin Dashboard. Once you’ve earned your $79.99 back, reinvest in promotion or new products. This isn’t a long-term plan—it’s a sprint. By tomorrow, you’ll have a global store that works, no matter where your buyers are.

No KYC, no bank account, no buyer accounts—just global payments, simplified.
